id.description: The unique identifier for the user, matching the auth UID.

healthScore.description: The user's current health engagement score.

dailyStreak.description: Number of consecutive days the user has engaged with the app.

lastCheckIn.description: The date of the user's last daily check-in (YYYY-MM-DD).

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user profile was created.

VaccinationRecord.title: Vaccination Record
VaccinationRecord.description: Represents a single vaccination record for a user.

userProfileId.description: The ID of the user this record belongs to.

dateAdministered.description: The date the vaccine was administered.

dose.description: The dose number or description (e.g., '1st Dose', 'Booster').

/userProfiles/{userProfileId}.description: Stores the public profiles of users.

/userProfiles/{userProfileId}/vaccinatio.description: Stores vaccination records for a specific user.
